category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Graphviz as graph visualization software from AT&T and Bell Labs.
display_name_sources: Official homepage at source_facts.homepage brands the project as Graphviz.
docs_sources: Official Graphviz site provides a dedicated /documentation/ section.
repo_sources: Official Graphviz site and release archive identify the GitLab Graphviz project as upstream source control.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says graph visualization software; source_facts.executables includes dot, neato, circo, fdp, and other layout tools.
